prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名持续上升及热门专业带动 报考热度增加，在2025年基准25583名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约25283名，区间24783–25783名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19296 → 24424 → 26781 → 23517 → 25583, showing an overall backward trend with significant fluctuations in recent 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 25583; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 54 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 45, unchanged from 2025, with stable total enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has risen continuously from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing attractiveness to candidates; in 2023, there was a negative evaluation due to a teacher's non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing; in 2024, the reputation was neutral/mixed (score line controversy); Douyin popularity is relatively hot (total ranking 32, comprehensive popularity about 1.365 million), with high exposure on short video platforms; no obvious enrollment gaps; fifth round of discipline evaluation; the school is characterized by agriculture, forestry, law, tourism management, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., are highly recommended hot majors, highly consistent with the school's Physics Category enrollment majors (computer science, electronic information, automation, communication, etc.); hot majors may increase application enthusiasm; in 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 200,000, slightly increased from 2025 (about 199,700), with slightly intensified competition; the Physics Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 336 → 362 → 360 → 368 → 367, basically stable; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, far from Liaoning, with regional preference differences for cross-provincial applications; the school's enrollment plan in Liaoning accounts for a small proportion (about 45 for Physics Category), which is a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the backward trend of historical rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and increased application enthusiasm driven by hot majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 25583; the predicted minimum ranking is about 25283, with a range of 24783–25783.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3410→4414→4761→3257→3370, with a significant backward shift in 2022–2023, a sharp rebound to 3257 in 2024, and basically stable at 3370 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 3370th place.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The local History Category enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 6, a reduction of 25% compared to 2025, with a significant reduction in enrollment, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has been continuously rising from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing attractiveness to candidates; in 2023, there was a negative evaluation due to the incident of teachers not cooperating with nucleic acid testing; in 2024, the reputation was neutral/mixed (score line controversy); Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 32nd overall, comprehensive popularity about 1.365 million), with high exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of admission gaps; fifth round of disciplines; the school is characterized by liberal arts such as law, agricultural and forestry economic management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of law major is relatively hot (recommended), Chinese language and literature major is recommended, accounting/finance/audit majors are recommended, which match well with the school's History Category enrollment majors (law, Chinese language and literature, accounting, international journalism and communication, etc.); the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 200,000, slightly increased from 2025 (about 199,700); the History Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 456→404→404→400→437, with significant fluctuations in recent years; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, far from Liaoning, with regional preference differences for cross-province applications; the school's History Category enrollment plan in Liaoning has been significantly reduced to 8 since 2024, and only 6 in 2026, which is a small-scale enrollment outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the basically stable ranking in 2025, a significant 25% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the driving effect of popular majors such as law, competition is expected to intensify significantly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2895th place, with a range of 2395–3395th place.
